detail.description: Cody Freeman flies out to second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr.
Cody Freeman grounds out, shortstop Ryan Kreidler to first baseman Royce Lewis.
Cody Freeman lines out to left fielder Trevor Larnach.
Cody Freeman grounds out softly, catcher Alex Jackson to first baseman Kody Clemens.
Cody Freeman grounds out, shortstop Ryan Kreidler to first baseman Kody Clemens.
Cody Freeman flies out to center fielder Byron Buxton.
Cody Freeman grounds out, pitcher Ryan Watson to first baseman Willson Contreras.
Cody Freeman singles on a ground ball to left fielder Jarren Duran, deflected by third baseman Caleb Durbin. Justin Foscue to 2nd.
Cody Freeman pops out to second baseman Isiah Kiner-Falefa.
Cody Freeman singles on a ground ball to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela. Justin Foscue to 2nd.
Cody Freeman singles on a soft ground ball to pitcher Tyron Guerrero.
Cody Freeman singles on a line drive to right fielder Jordan Walker, deflected by first baseman Alec Burleson.
